title: Orange Tree Toys Alphabet Puzzle - Wooden ABC Shark Puzzles for Toddlers, Jigsaw Puzzle Games - Montessori Educational Toys for Early Development
features: DEVELOP KEY MOTOR SKILLS: This jigsaw puzzle is the perfect size for little hands and, with pieces chunky enough to grab, they can be pulled apart and reassembled easily to stimulate their fine motor skills. Our Wooden puzzle helps promote letter recognition and educational puzzle games provide hours of fun for little ones

SAFE FOR PLAY: Painted with non-toxic paint this wooden puzzle will help support children with learning their letters. All Orange Tree toys and puzzle games are tested both in-house during production and independently to meet European safety standards. Suitable from age 12 months

ENGAGING FOR ALL AGES: Wooden puzzles are a great way to make learning fun and the bright colours of this shark toy help stimulate their visual development. These jigsaw puzzles for kids of all ages are an amazing way to help your child develop their dexterity and hand-eye co-ordination while you introduce, improve and practice letter recognition through play

TRUSTED MANUFACTURER: Designed in the UK by Orange Tree Toys in their headquarters in the Cotswold countryside. Orange Tree toys are environmentally friendly; made from sustainable wood and 100% recyclable packaging. Wooden toys are durable and long lasting; they can be passed down the generations!

PERFECT GIFT: Jigsaw puzzles for kids and animal toys are ideal 1st birthday gifts for girls and boys, Christmas presents, Christening gifts or for another special occasion. They also make wonderful educational toys for 3 year olds and help consolidate their literacy knowledge before starting preschool or infant school
description: From the manufacturer Traditional Wooden Toys Our beautiful wooden toys are all lovingly designed in the UK. Our toys are designed for maximum fun and safety, proving a range a beautifully crafted traditional children's toys which last for years are are sure to become toy box treasures. Designed for Maximum Fun & safety All Orange Tree toys are tested both in-house during production and independently to meet European safety standards. All of our toys are painted using non-toxic paint. Licensed Toys As well as our own bright and colourful range of toys, we are also proud to hold the license for some truly traditional childhood favourites! We offer a beautiful range of products for Peter Rabbit, Winnie the Pooh and Paddington Bear.
